data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. OPAWA JIMMY has a strong record this track and trip with eight wins and four placings from 18 starts. Recorded a 4 length win (21.07) in a Class 5 last time at this track. Beat most of his rivals here last start and should feature again. 8. BOSTON JUNIOR was a course and distance placegetter (21.34) last time also from the same draw, finishing a 4 length second in a Class 5. Worth following up. 7. PORTLAND COCO is progressing well and looks close to another win after hitting the frame from Box 4 last run (18.90) at Manukau. Has a strong record out of this box with two wins and a minor placing from four starts. Expecting another good run. 4. OPAWA TAZ has ability and finds the right scenario to bounce back. Has reliable box manners.","runners":[6,8,7,4],"exclusive":false}
